brain_consensus.narrative: The market is trapped in a textbook denial phase, with Fear & Greed plumbing 28 and 30-day BTC momentum stalling out—mirroring the exhaustion zone that preceded the August 2024 bottom. A weakening DXY is providing a subtle tailwind, but the crowd remains too shell-shocked to recognize the structural similarities to that prior recovery setup. The silence before the storm is deafening.
brain_consensus.headline: Fear Grips the Bid as DXY Whispers a Bottom

next_move.reasoning: The 78% match to bottom_2024_aug is structurally misleading: fear_greed similarity (+3 diff) masks that stablecoin_growth is -14 (less dry powder), mvrv_zscore is -16 (less oversold), and funding is +18 (more complacent leverage) — this is Disbelief with weaker conviction than August, not a replay. The 0% 12h window volatility over 7 days is the dominant signal; with 8.7% direction accuracy and 0% transition accuracy, my directional calls have been noise. The coil breaks on ETF flow exhaustion (now 100, unsustainable) or VIX spike >22 confirming risk-off; until then, score drifts 55-62.
